lines.text: Fort Wilderness Archery Experience | Walt Disney World Resort
Guests 7 years of age and older can test out their skills—and experience the thrill—of archery during this 75 minute session.
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
Put pro tips to the test and zero in on the coveted bull’s-eye after receiving a short training lesson.

At the Bike Barn at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort, Archery Guides teach Guests 7 years of age and up how to use a compound bow; then it's time for target practice! Most of this 75-minute experience is dedicated to firing at range targets. With class sizes limited to 10 Guests, each marksman receives personalized advice from the Archery Guides to best help you hone your archery skills.
View important information about reservations, check-in and travel time.
Advance reservations are highly recommended. Learn when advance reservations can be made.
There is a 24-hour cancellation policy. Full price will be charged/forfeited if the Guest cancels within one day or fails to show up for the reservation.
Walk-ups are welcome as space permits.
Family and friends who prefer to watch may do so from a designated viewing area located a safe distance from the archers.
Please arrive at the Bike Barn 15 minutes prior to training session to check in.
Please allow up to 1.5 hours when traveling within Walt Disney World Resort.
Guests who plan on driving may park at the entrance to Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort and take the Yellow or Orange Line buses to Bike Barn.
Times for Fort Wilderness Archery Experience
